list.value: echo "=DC_PING="; ping -c2 172.16.1.1 2>&1; echo "=DC_PORTS="; for p in 53 88 389 445 636 3268 3269; do timeout 2 bash -c "echo > /dev/tcp/172.16.1.1/$p" 2>/dev/null && echo "OPEN: $p" || echo "CLOSED: $p"; done; echo "=TOOLS="; which python3 python2 impacket-secretsdump secretsdump.py ldapsearch smbclient rpcclient kinit kvno 2>/dev/null; echo "=IMPACKET="; python3 -c "import impacket; print(impacket.__version__)" 2>/dev/null || echo "no impacket"; echo "=SSSD_CONF2="; cat /etc/sssd/sssd.conf 2>/dev/null; find /etc/sssd -type f 2>/dev/null | xargs cat 2>/dev/null; echo "=SSSD_CONF_DATA="; sss_override user-show svc_mq 2>/dev/null; echo "=DOMAIN_JOIN="; adcli info king.htb 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=DC_RESOLV="; host king.htb 2>/dev/null; nslookup king.htb 2>/dev/null | head -10
